# Copilot Instructions - Pokémon Web System

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Project type: Next.js with TypeScript
	- No Tailwind CSS
	- Consume PokeAPI

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
	- Create Next.js project structure with TypeScript

- [ ] Customize the Project
	- Implement Pokemon listing and details pages
	- Create components for Pokemon cards and details
	- Add API integration with PokeAPI

- [ ] Install Required Extensions

- [ ] Compile the Project

- [ ] Create and Run Task

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
